name: Apple Cards Carousel
summary: An elegant carousel component inspired by Apple's design language, featuring smooth card transitions, 3D perspective effects, and intuitive navigation for showcasing products, portfolios, or featured content.
detailedDescription: The Apple Cards Carousel component brings premium, Apple-inspired design aesthetics to content carousels with its signature smooth transitions and refined visual presentation. This component excels at displaying sequences of cards - whether products, portfolio pieces, testimonials, or featured content - in an horizontally scrolling format that feels both familiar and elevated. The carousel features a sophisticated 3D perspective effect where cards in the background appear smaller and slightly rotated, creating depth and drawing attention to the center-focused active card. Navigation is intuitive and responsive, supporting click, drag, and swipe gestures across desktop and touch devices. The component includes automatic scrolling with configurable intervals, pause-on-hover functionality, and manual navigation controls through arrows or pagination dots. Each card in the carousel maintains consistent styling while allowing full customization of content including images, text, badges, and call-to-action buttons. The animation timing is carefully tuned to feel natural and responsive, using smooth easing curves that mimic the fluid motion found in Apple's interfaces. Perfect for product showcases, app feature highlights, portfolio galleries, or any context where sequential content presentation benefits from premium visual treatment.
purpose: Showcase products, features, or portfolio pieces in an elegant, scrollable format
Create premium, Apple-inspired visual experiences that convey quality and sophistication
Present sequential content with clear visual hierarchy and focus on active item
Provide intuitive navigation through content collections with multiple interaction methods
Enhance perceived value through refined animations and polished visual presentation
behavior: Scrolls horizontally through cards with smooth, eased transitions
Applies 3D perspective transforms to create depth with scaled background cards
Centers active card with automatic positioning and focus management
Supports drag-to-scroll on desktop and swipe gestures on touch devices
Optionally auto-scrolls at configurable intervals with pause-on-hover
Provides navigation controls including arrows, dots, or keyboard arrows
Maintains consistent card sizing and spacing throughout scroll sequence
Responds to window resize with smooth layout recalculation
visualCharacteristics: Premium Apple-inspired aesthetic with refined proportions and spacing
3D perspective creating depth perception with layered card arrangement
Smooth, fluid animations that feel natural and responsive
Clean, minimal card design emphasizing content over decoration
Subtle shadows and highlights enhancing three-dimensional appearance
Professional, sophisticated appearance suitable for high-end products and services
recommendations: Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
